reviewer_sources.query: Go to https://www.nytimes.com/wirecutter/reviews/best-portable-chargers/ and extract every portable charger and power bank they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their award or category, price, capacity (mAh), output wattage, ports, weight, pros with specific test details, cons.

Go to https://www.nytimes.com/wirecutter/reviews/best-usb-c-laptop-battery-packs/ and extract every USB-C laptop power bank they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their award or category, price, capacity (mAh/Wh), output wattage, ports, weight, pros with specific test details, cons.

Go to https://www.wired.com/gallery/best-portable-chargers-power-banks and extract every portable charger and power bank they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their award or category, price, capacity (mAh), output wattage, ports, key features, pros with specific test details, cons.

Go to https://www.pcmag.com/picks/the-best-portable-chargers-and-power-banks and extract every portable charger they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their rating and award, price, capacity, output wattage, ports, pros with specific benchmark results, cons.

Go to https://www.tomsguide.com/best-picks/best-portable-chargers and extract every portable charger and power bank they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their award or category, price, capacity (mAh), output wattage, ports, weight, pros with specific lab test results, cons.
